caption: The video features a split-screen format with a woman on the left side and a dramatic, stormy sky on the right. The woman, who appears to be in a kitchen setting, is speaking directly to the camera. She has short blonde hair and is wearing a black top. The background behind her includes kitchen elements like a stove and some utensils. On the right side of the screen, the words "Popcorn Hailstones" are prominently displayed in a glowing font against a backdrop of dark, ominous clouds, suggesting an impending storm or severe weather event. The overall tone of the video seems to be informative, possibly discussing the phenomenon of popcorn hailstones in relation to the storm depicted in the background.
